title: Capability snapshot: Codex 0.144.4 + Claude profile
action: Create docs/history/codex-harness-hardening/snapshots/capability-snapshot.json capturing host capability surface (SPEC §3, §5.2, E-12, D-05/D-06). Record codex 0.144.4; Codex tool surface (outer functions.exec, nested tools.exec_command, tools.apply_patch; collaboration spawn_agent{task_name,message,fork_turns} + followup_task; no model selector); Claude profile (Edit/Write/MultiEdit/Bash/Read/Glob/Grep, Agent/Task). Each field carries provenance documented|live_probed; mark nested-event interception and fresh-task discovery provenance=pending_live_probe (L6/L7 deferred per D-05).
verify: node -e "const s=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('docs/history/codex-harness-hardening/snapshots/capability-snapshot.json','utf8')); if(!s.codex||!s.claude) throw new Error('missing host'); if(s.codex.version!=='0.144.4') throw new Error('codex version'); const c=JSON.stringify(s.codex); if(!(c.includes('functions.exec')&&c.includes('exec_command')&&c.includes('apply_patch'))) throw new Error('codex tool surface'); if(!(c.includes('spawn_agent')&&c.includes('followup_task'))) throw new Error('collaboration'); if(!JSON.stringify(s.claude).match(/Edit|Write|Bash/)) throw new Error('claude profile'); if(!JSON.stringify(s).includes('pending_live_probe')) throw new Error('must mark deferred live probes'); console.log('SNAPSHOT-OK');"

truths: valid JSON; top-level keys codex + claude
records codex 0.144.4, outer functions.exec + nested exec_command/apply_patch, collaboration spawn_agent{task_name,message,fork_turns}+followup_task
every capability field labelled provenance documented|live_probed|pending_live_probe; nested-event + fresh-task discovery marked pending_live_probe (honest per D-05)
prohibitions: do not assert any live mechanical proof that has not actually been probed

trace.verify_command: node -e "const s=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('docs/history/codex-harness-hardening/snapshots/capability-snapshot.json','utf8')); if(!s.codex||!s.claude) throw new Error('missing host'); if(s.codex.version!=='0.144.4') throw new Error('codex version'); const c=JSON.stringify(s.codex); if(!(c.includes('functions.exec')&&c.includes('exec_command')&&c.includes('apply_patch'))) throw new Error('codex tool surface'); if(!(c.includes('spawn_agent')&&c.includes('followup_task'))) throw new Error('collaboration'); if(!JSON.stringify(s.claude).match(/Edit|Write|Bash/)) throw new Error('claude profile'); if(!JSON.stringify(s).includes('pending_live_probe')) throw new Error('must mark deferred live probes'); console.log('SNAPSHOT-OK');"
